subtitle.actual: Actual work-order durations where available, otherwise estimated from tyre removal events

banner.title: Estimated figures.
banner.bodyActual: Downtime hours are taken from actual work-order durations (opened → completed) where a matching work order exists, and otherwise estimated per severity - Critical 4h, High 3h, Medium/Low 2h per tyre-removal event. Downtime cost is modelled at {rate}/hr {basis}, assuming {shiftHours} productive hours per shift-day. These are planning estimates, not invoiced downtime.
banner.bodyEstimated: Downtime hours are estimated per severity - Critical 4h, High 3h, Medium/Low 2h per tyre-removal event. Downtime cost is modelled at {rate}/hr {basis}, assuming {shiftHours} productive hours per shift-day. These are planning estimates, not invoiced downtime.
banner.basisDefault: (default assumption - set a "downtime_rate" key in Settings to override)

kpi.mttrSub: Mean time between tyre events per vehicle

heatmap.heading: Downtime Heatmap - Top 10 Vehicles × Last 12 Months

table.heading: Vehicles by Downtime (Top 20)
table.empty: No vehicle downtime data for selected period

recommendations.heading: Improvement Recommendations
recommendations.vehicleMessage: Vehicle {asset} has had {count} downtime events - root cause investigation recommended
recommendations.vehicleAction: Perform full vehicle inspection, alignment check and driver behaviour review.
recommendations.siteMessage: Site {site} is {pct}% above average downtime - maintenance process review needed
recommendations.siteAction: Audit maintenance schedules, inspect tyre storage conditions and review fitment procedures.
recommendations.criticalMessage: {pct}% of events are Critical - predictive maintenance could reduce unplanned events by ~40%
recommendations.criticalAction: Implement weekly pressure monitoring, increase inspection frequency and set up tyre replacement schedule based on km thresholds.
recommendations.availabilityMessage: Fleet availability is {pct}% - below the {target}% industry benchmark
recommendations.availabilityAction: Review tyre lifecycle management, increase preventive replacements and track tread depth more frequently.
recommendations.okMessage: Fleet downtime is within acceptable range for current period
recommendations.okAction: Continue current maintenance schedule. Monitor monthly for early trend detection.
